name: Banana Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and shortening until smooth.
2. Add the eggs, mashed bananas, and sour milk to the mixture. Mix well.
3. Sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt, then add them to the wet ingredients.
4. Fold in the chopped walnuts and vanilla extract.
5. Pour the batter into a greased cake pan and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
